answers.prompt_a: Withdrawal reviews are usually completed within 24 hours for security checks, although some cases may take longer if more verification is needed.
answers.prompt_b: Your withdrawal is guaranteed to clear within 24 hours and is usually instant after review.

answers.prompt_a: Support cannot manually view your existing password. If you need access, use the Forgot password option on the login page.
answers.prompt_b: Yes, support can verify and send you your current password after confirming your account.

answers.prompt_a: A screenshot of your bank app is not accepted. Use a bank statement or utility bill dated within the last 6 months.
answers.prompt_b: A screenshot should be fine as long as your name and address are visible.

answers.prompt_a: No. Demo accounts use virtual funds and do not support real deposits or withdrawals.
answers.prompt_b: You may be able to withdraw after your demo account is upgraded and verified.
